mechanism: Seeds, leaves, and bark contain a variety of alkaloids; deoxytubulosine and related alkaloids exhibit cytotoxic and antimicrobial activities; specific mechanisms involve DNA intercalation and enzyme inhibition【979907954310287†L106-L115】.
contraindications: Due to potent alkaloids, can be toxic; use with caution and avoid during pregnancy or without medical supervision.
